name: SIC Toile
_design_note: SIC — Latin editorial notation meaning 'thus it was written / thus it stands.' The name signals institutional permanence and archival authority. The aesthetic draws from Toile de Jouy: 18th-century French textile pattern, single-color copper-plate engravings of narrative pastoral and institutional scenes on cream ground. Every object in this theme is an engraving, not a render.
_color_philosophy: This is the only light-background theme. Warm cream (#F5F0E8) is the canvas — the ground on which everything is engraved. Indigo (#2A2ECD) is the ONLY color used for both illustrations AND text — they share an ink. There is no separation between 'image color' and 'text color.' Everything is printed in the same indigo on the same cream, like a copper-plate atlas page.

headline.role: Primary headline — uppercase, tracked. Institutional proclamation register. Feels like a cartouche title on an 18th-century map.

body.role: Body and subtext — contemporary sans against the historical serif headline. The contrast is intentional: the thesis is timeless (serif), the argument is present-tense (sans).

annotation.role: Small label annotations — engraving plate-number style. Used for domain labels, archetype markers.

cartouche_title.role: Cover slide headline inside the cartouche frame. Largest, most formal text in the system.

image_prompt_template: Single-color copper-plate engraving illustration of {name} in {state} condition, rendered entirely in indigo (#2A2ECD) on transparent/white ground — NO color other than this single indigo, fine parallel hatching for mid-tones, cross-hatching for deep shadow areas, stippling for soft texture, clean confident contour lines, 18th-century French or English engraving aesthetic — Encyclopédie Diderot / Audubon Birds of America / Piranesi Vedute register, full narrative scene with ground plane and environmental detail, {figures_instruction}, elaborate but legible at carousel scale, no photography, no gradients, no fills — pure line and mark work only

cover_hook.name: Cover Hook
cover_hook.description: Cartouche title frame — the map-maker's proclamation. Grand engraving scene above, ornate cartouche containing headline below.
cover_hook.notes: The cartouche is the structural signature of SIC Toile covers. Upper 65% is the engraving scene — full width, no margin. Lower 35% contains an engraved decorative cartouche frame (oval or rectangular with foliate border) inside which the headline sits in Playfair Display 900 uppercase. Logo appears as an engraved plate mark — small, bottom-right of cartouche. CTA 'SWIPE →' in annotation style, lower-right margin.

context_setter.name: Context Setter
context_setter.description: Wide establishing scene — the world of the argument, depicted as landscape
context_setter.notes: Headline in upper zone, engraving scene in lower two-thirds. Headline in Playfair uppercase, wide tracking. Scene is an establishing landscape — the environment of the argument. A thin engraved rule line separates headline zone from scene zone.

problem_setup.name: Problem Setup
problem_setup.description: A scene of institutional decay or obstruction — ruins, overgrowth, burdened figures
problem_setup.notes: Scene in lower-right quadrant, showing decay or obstruction state. Headline upper-left in Playfair uppercase. A single engraved annotation label marks the scene domain — top-right, in small tracking caps. State: in ruins, overgrown, or burdened.

problem_escalation.name: Problem Escalation
problem_escalation.description: A scene of disorder — figures in chaos, structures collapsed, systems in failure
problem_escalation.notes: Engraving fills most of slide with a scene of disorder. Text occupies upper-left zone, constrained to ~40% width. Engraving extends behind text at reduced opacity if needed — but indigo text on cream is always legible. State: in disorder or collapsed.

turning_point.name: Turning Point
turning_point.description: A scene of discovery or newly opened territory — the horizon shifts
turning_point.notes: The engraving shifts register from the problem slides — newly surveyed territory, open horizons, ascending figures. Text below-left. The spatial openness in the engraving signals the narrative turn. State: newly opened or newly surveyed.

pivot_question.name: Pivot Question
pivot_question.description: Text-only — cream canvas, single question in Playfair uppercase, no engraving
pivot_question.notes: Pure cream canvas. Question in Playfair Display 700 uppercase at 100px, deep indigo. A thin single engraved rule line above and below the text block — the only decoration. No engraving scene. The cream silence is the visual statement. The engraved rules frame the question like a chapter title in an 18th-century treatise.

solution_introduction.name: Solution Introduction
solution_introduction.description: A scene of discovery in progress — the new instrument, the new mechanism, revealed
solution_introduction.notes: Scene depicts the solution concept in Enlightenment discovery register — a natural philosopher demonstrating, a navigator with new instruments, an architect presenting plans. State: in discovery or demonstrated. Headline upper-left. Clean, confident engraving — more open line work than the problem slides.

landscape_overview.name: Landscape Overview
landscape_overview.description: Panoramic map view — territory surveyed, options charted, the full landscape visible
landscape_overview.notes: The engraving is a bird's-eye or map-view scene — a wide panorama of the competitive landscape or solution space. The composition is deliberately wide and complex, like a cartographic plate. Headline upper-left. Three annotation labels in the engraving mark the key areas being discussed.

technical_foundation.name: Technical Foundation
technical_foundation.description: Architectural cross-section or mechanical diagram — the infrastructure revealed
technical_foundation.notes: The engraving is an architectural cross-section, engineering diagram, or mechanical exploded view — the kind found in Diderot's Encyclopédie. Multiple labeled components. Technical precision. State: under construction. The diagram aesthetic signals: this is how it actually works, not metaphor.

how_it_works_setup.name: How It Works (Setup)
how_it_works_setup.description: Two figures in correspondence or preparation — the handshake before the work begins
how_it_works_setup.notes: Scene depicts the initiation moment — merchant preparing goods, navigator setting coordinates, architect reviewing plans. Two or more figures in the scene, oriented toward the activity. State: in correspondence.

how_it_works_flow.name: How It Works (Flow)
how_it_works_flow.description: Scene of process in full operation — the mechanism turning, the sequence in motion
how_it_works_flow.notes: The engraving shows movement and operation — figures actively engaged, mechanical elements turning, goods flowing. Kinetic composition implied through figure poses and cascading arrangement. State: in full operation or in succession.

how_it_works_security.name: How It Works (Security)
how_it_works_security.description: Scene of official sealing, witnessing, or certification — institutional gravity
how_it_works_security.notes: Scene depicts the moment of official confirmation — a document being sealed, a ceremony of certification, figures in formal witness. Dignified composition. State: sealed and witnessed or demonstrated.

company_positioning.name: Company Positioning
company_positioning.description: Allegorical procession or assembly — figures in aspirational movement, the institution at its best
company_positioning.notes: The grandest engraving in the carousel — a full-width scene depicting the company's mission in allegorical terms. A procession of merchants, navigators, architects, and scholars moving forward. Logo appears as an engraved plate mark. State: in procession or flourishing.

cta_close.name: CTA Close
cta_close.description: Cream canvas with engraved rules and colophon — the book's final page
cta_close.notes: Pure cream. Headline in Playfair uppercase. Two thin engraved rule lines frame the text block — one above, one below. Below the lower rule: the brand name as a plate mark (small, formal). Below that: a small engraved ornament (fleuron or printer's mark). Then the CTA text in DM Sans annotation style. The slide reads like the final page of an 18th-century treatise — colophon, author mark, closing.

objects.name: cartouche from an 18th-century atlas with compass rose, sea monsters in the margins, and decorative scrollwork framing a blank map territory
objects.material: fine copper-plate line work, open sea areas with parallel hatch waves
objects.figures_instruction: two cartographers at the corners unrolling the map

objects.name: navigator with a sextant on the deck of a ship, celestial sphere visible to one side, coastline emerging from fog in the background
objects.material: fine cross-hatching for sea and sky, clean contour on instrument
objects.figures_instruction: single navigator figure, back to viewer, looking to horizon

objects.name: large celestial globe on an ornate mechanical stand in a library interior, maps and folios around the base
objects.material: stippled globe surface with engraved meridian lines, detailed library shelving behind
objects.figures_instruction: one scholar figure gesturing at the globe to two observers

objects.name: surveying party on a hill crest with theodolite and measuring chains, wide open territory below being mapped, flags marking survey points in the distance
objects.material: open hatching for sky, detailed figure work for surveyors, distant landscape in fine line
objects.figures_instruction: three-figure surveying team actively at work

objects.name: bird's-eye plan view of a trade route network connecting ports and inland towns, ships at sea, caravans on roads, all labeled with distance annotations
objects.material: cartographic line work — clean roads, stylized sea hatching, tiny building icons for towns
objects.figures_instruction: no figures — cartographic diagram only

objects.name: counting house interior with tall windows, merchants at slanted desks with ledger books, coin stacks and bills of exchange on the central table
objects.material: deep cross-hatching for shadow zones, clean line work on figures and furniture, stippled floor
objects.figures_instruction: four or five merchant figures at various stages of counting, writing, and consulting

objects.name: busy quayside scene with merchant ship being loaded, cranes swinging cargo, merchants gesturing at manifests, small boats ferrying goods
objects.material: fine rigging detail on ship, active figure poses, deep hatching on water
objects.figures_instruction: seven or eight figures in active loading and negotiation poses

objects.name: apothecary balance scale with stacked coin towers on one pan and a pile of goods receipts on the other, set on a counting table with scattered documents
objects.material: highly detailed scale mechanism, fine hatching on documents, polished brass rendered in clean line
objects.figures_instruction: two merchant hands visible at the edges adjusting weights

objects.name: exchange floor interior — colonnaded hall crowded with merchants in animated discussion, notice boards with rates posted, clerks moving through the crowd
objects.material: architectural columns in deep shadow, crowd rendered in loose but legible groupings, light flooding from clerestory windows
objects.figures_instruction: dense crowd of fourteen or more figures in various states of transaction and conversation

objects.name: ornate bill of exchange document with engraved header, seals, and signatures — the document itself depicted as an engraving within the engraving
objects.material: extreme fine line work for document typography and border details, seals rendered in cross-hatch
objects.figures_instruction: no figures — document study only

objects.name: columned hall of governance — assembled delegates seated in a semicircular chamber, a speaker at the rostrum, light falling from high windows
objects.material: architectural detail in clean line, figure groupings in varied poses, deep column shadows in cross-hatch
objects.figures_instruction: thirty or more assembled delegates, speaker prominent at rostrum

objects.name: ceremonial signing of a charter — large table with the document, dignitaries seated around it, a quill being passed, witnesses standing behind
objects.material: document given prominence in composition center, fine figure detail, candlelit interior suggested by hatching
objects.figures_instruction: eight to ten figures, one actively signing, others witnessing formally

objects.name: grand seal press with two officials operating it — the hot wax, the signet, the completed document waiting
objects.material: mechanical detail of the press, dramatic hatching for the wax pool, clean contour on seal face
objects.figures_instruction: two official figures operating the seal press with ceremonial gravity

objects.name: ruined arcade of a once-grand institutional building — columns fallen, weeds emerging from cracks, a single figure surveying the damage
objects.material: heavy cross-hatching for ruin shadows, fine botanical detail on encroaching vegetation, dramatic perspective
objects.figures_instruction: one solitary figure with back to viewer, contemplating the ruin

objects.name: a notice board outside an institution posting new regulations — crowd gathered reading it, some in animated discussion, others walking away
objects.material: notice board as composition center, crowd in varied reading and reaction poses
objects.figures_instruction: twelve figures in various states of reading, discussion, and reaction

objects.name: public demonstration of the Leyden jar — sparks visible, audience of scholars leaning in, the demonstrator in theatrical pose with the apparatus
objects.material: dramatic spark rendering in fine line radiating from jar, audience faces lit from the apparatus glow suggested by hatching
objects.figures_instruction: eight observers in various states of wonder and attention, one demonstrator at center

objects.name: naturalist's collection spread — specimens pinned and mounted, microscope to one side, detailed illustrations in progress, classification system visible on wall
objects.material: extreme fine line work on specimens, botanical and zoological detail, grid system visible in background
objects.figures_instruction: one naturalist figure examining specimen through magnifying glass

objects.name: large reflecting telescope installed in an observatory dome — astronomer at the eyepiece, clockwork drive mechanism visible, star charts on the desk below
objects.material: dome architecture in deep shadow, instrument in careful detail, circular window showing star field in stipple
objects.figures_instruction: one astronomer and one assistant recording observations

objects.name: Encyclopédie-style plate: cross-section of a new industrial process with labeled parts A through K, workers operating at each stage
objects.material: technical diagram aesthetic — clean outlines, letter labels, numbered callouts in the style of Diderot's plates
objects.figures_instruction: five worker figures at labeled stations A through E

objects.name: laboratory of experimental philosophy — distillation apparatus, retort stands, air pumps, and a mechanical orrery, all on a long workbench
objects.material: complex but ordered arrangement, each instrument in fine detail, clean shadows
objects.figures_instruction: two philosophers in discussion with instruments between them

objects.name: grand stone arch bridge under construction — scaffolding and centring in place, workers with ropes and blocks raising keystones, river below with supply barges
objects.material: stone masonry in careful cross-hatch, scaffolding in fine line, water with parallel hatch, active construction energy
objects.figures_instruction: twelve workers at various stages of construction above and on the bridge

objects.name: Piranesi-inspired cross-section through a multi-level underground infrastructure — vaults, pipes, and passages at different depths, labeled with scale bar
objects.material: dramatic Piranesi-style hatching for vault shadows, bold architectural geometry, figure for scale
objects.figures_instruction: two small figures in the lowest vault for scale reference

objects.name: architect presenting elevation drawing to patrons at a drafting table — full plan rolled out, elevation pinned to the wall, model visible to one side
objects.material: plan drawing in technical line work, patron figures in more fluid sketch style
objects.figures_instruction: one architect and three patron figures examining the plans

objects.name: ruined aqueduct — one half still standing and functioning, the other half collapsed with vegetation, the break visible at center
objects.material: intact section in confident clean line, collapsed section in heavy shadow and ruin detail, botanical overgrowth in fine stipple
objects.figures_instruction: two figures examining the break point, one making notes

objects.name: grand canal lock system in operation — water levels adjusting, lock gates open and closing, boats waiting in queue, lock-keeper at the controls
objects.material: mechanical detail of lock gates, water level difference visible, boats in perspective queue
objects.figures_instruction: lock-keeper operating mechanism, three boats with crew waiting

objects.name: grand library interior — double-height shelving to the ceiling, reading tables with scholars bent over large folios, rolling ladders, globes on pedestals
objects.material: architectural grandeur in deep perspective, warm hatching for reading lamp zones, fine figure detail at tables
objects.figures_instruction: six scholars at various tables, two on ladders retrieving volumes, one consulting a globe

objects.name: printing press in full operation — compositor setting type at the case, pressmen inking and pulling the bar, freshly printed sheets hanging to dry
objects.material: mechanical press detail, active figure poses showing physical labor, hanging sheets in fine outline
objects.figures_instruction: four print workers at distinct stages of the presswork process

objects.name: scholar's desk in a state of productive disorder — open volumes, manuscripts being cross-referenced, quill in hand, candles, wax, and seals to one side
objects.material: rich surface detail on desk objects, open book pages with visible text lines, candlelight zone in warm hatching
objects.figures_instruction: one scholar figure seen from above and behind, absorbed in work

objects.name: academy of sciences in session — members presenting a paper before an assembly, diagrams on the wall, secretary recording, members following in their own copies
objects.material: formal hall architecture, presentation diagram visible as inset element, assembled members in attentive poses
objects.figures_instruction: one presenter, one secretary, twenty attending members

objects.name: a burning archive — figures rushing to save documents from smoke and flame, some volumes already lost, others being carried out
objects.material: dramatic flame rendered in fine upward line work, smoke in cross-hatch, figures in urgent poses
objects.figures_instruction: eight figures in urgent rescue, some carrying volumes, some overcome by smoke

objects.name: treasury interior — vaulted room with clerks counting coin at long tables, sealed strongboxes stacked along the walls, guards at the entrance
objects.material: vaulted architecture in deep shadow, coin stacks in fine repetitive detail, strongbox ironwork in close cross-hatch
objects.figures_instruction: six counting clerks, two guards, one official inspector

objects.name: exchange building exterior — grand colonnade with merchants ascending the steps, notice boards visible through the columns, city life around the base
objects.material: architectural grandeur in strong perspective, figure detail on steps, city background in diminishing detail
objects.figures_instruction: fifteen figures on steps and entrance — ascending, conversing, reading posted notices

objects.name: estate map with the great house at center, grounds laid out in formal plan, tenant farms annotated around the edges, river and roads labeled
objects.material: cartographic plan style — house as elevation inset, grounds in plan view, fine annotation typography
objects.figures_instruction: no figures — cartographic map study

objects.name: the ruin of a great merchant house — empty counting rooms, overturned ledgers, a single creditor examining the wreckage of accounts
objects.material: overturned furniture in dramatic shadow, scattered documents with fine detail, desolate interior light
objects.figures_instruction: one figure alone among the ruin, holding a single document

objects.name: the founding moment — a group of merchants signing the original articles of a company, quill in hand, document prominent, candles and wine on the table
objects.material: intimate interior, candlelight zone in warm hatching, document as composition center
objects.figures_instruction: seven founding figures — one signing, others witnessing with varying expressions of gravity and hope

cartouche-center._note: Text is inside the cartouche frame — inset from the cartouche borders by ~89px on each side

cartouche.description: An engraved decorative border — foliate scrollwork, classical ribbon work, or architectural pediment — framing the headline text. Used on the cover as the map-maker's title device. Used on CTA as a colophon frame.
cartouche.prompt_note: Engraved cartouche frame only — no fill, line work only, cream interior, indigo border detail

rule_lines.description: Single thin engraved horizontal rules separating zones — like chapter dividers in an 18th-century printed volume
rule_lines.style: single line, full width between margins

annotation_labels.description: Small uppercase tracking labels identifying the depicted scene or domain — like plate descriptions in an atlas
annotation_labels.position: top-right corner of slide, within safe zone

plate_number.description: Small roman numeral or arabic numeral in annotation style — like an atlas plate number
